title: place.openingHoursAdjustedDays
description: List of specific date ranges during which custom opening hours override the default schedule. Only applicable for calendarType `periodic` and `permanent`. An empty array clears all previously set adjusted opening hours.

startDate.description: Start of the adjusted opening hours date range (inclusive), in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). For periodic places, must fall within the main startDate/endDate.

endDate.description: End of the adjusted opening hours date range (inclusive), in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). For periodic places, this must be on or after startDate, and within the main startDate/endDate. When openingHoursClosedDays overlap with this range, the closed days take precedence.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the adjusted opening hours period, as localized text. Maximum 1000 characters per language.
